description: Observed A+B=C rows extracted from labeled paint-mixing screenshots captured from short-form videos. Colors are sampled from screenshot blobs rather than laboratory reflectance measurements.

ratioTreatment.note: This dataset mixes explicit screenshot percentages with single-result screenshots that do not expose ratios. Ratio-unknown rows are retained with placeholder 1:1 parts and sourceRatioKnown=false.

colorSampling.note: Foreground paint regions are isolated by subtracting the local crop-border background color and taking the largest connected component.

curationNotes: This source class is observational rather than laboratory measured.
Text labels and displayed percentages were manually reviewed from the screenshots.
Input and target colors are sampled from the visible paint blobs in the screenshots using local background subtraction.
Single-result screenshots without explicit percentages are retained with sourceRatioKnown=false and placeholder parts of 1:1.
